title: prunella cretensis
intro: Prunella cretensis, also known as Greek valerian or spike speedwell, is a flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. The plant has been known to have health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Prunella cretensis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
